_note: Diligence question templates by workstream. The question service uses these plus target/risk context to assemble the workspace's question list. `{target}` is substituted with the target name.

workstreams.label: Commercial diligence
questions: How does {target} win against Descartes, SPS Commerce, and in-house/GRC point solutions in competitive deals?
What is the split of new-logo vs. expansion ARR over the last 8 quarters?
How durable is the regulatory tailwind (UFLPA, CBAM, conflict minerals) driving demand, and what happens if enforcement softens?
What is win rate by segment and how has average sales cycle trended?

workstreams.label: Product & technology diligence
questions: What is the architecture's dependency on a single cloud provider, and what is the migration cost/risk?
How much of the screening/matching engine is proprietary vs. reliant on third-party watchlist data feeds?
What is the technical debt profile and the state of test coverage and release cadence?
How defensible is the product against AI-native entrants that can automate counterparty screening?

workstreams.label: Financial diligence
questions: Confirm quality of earnings: how much of the 16% EBITDA margin is sustainable vs. one-time cost deferral?
What is the bridge from GAAP revenue to ARR, and how is ARR defined and recognized?
What are S&M and R&D as a percentage of revenue vs. peers, and what is the path to Rule-of-40 improvement?
What is the cash conversion / free-cash-flow margin, and are there working-capital seasonality effects?

workstreams.label: Customer diligence
questions: What percentage of ARR comes from the top 10 customers, and what is the contractual lock-in?
How has gross and net revenue retention trended by cohort and by segment?
Are compliance-review workflows mission-critical or discretionary for customers?
What is the average implementation time by customer segment, and how does it affect churn in year one?

workstreams.label: Market diligence
questions: What is the credible TAM/SAM for supply-chain compliance software, and what is the growth rate?
How sensitive is demand to industrial production and global-trade volume cycles?
Which adjacent regulatory regimes could expand or contract the addressable market over 3–5 years?

workstreams.label: Legal & regulatory diligence
questions: Are there any open investigations, litigation, or customer disputes?
What is {target}'s own regulatory/data-handling exposure (GDPR, cross-border data, watchlist licensing terms)?
What are the IP ownership and open-source license positions for the core screening engine?

workstreams.label: Cybersecurity diligence
questions: What is the incident/breach history, and what were remediation outcomes?
What certifications are held (SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001), and when were they last audited?
How is customer PII and counterparty data segregated, encrypted, and retained?

workstreams.label: AI / data diligence
questions: What data rights underpin the screening/matching models, and are watchlist data licenses transferable on change of control?
Where is AI/ML used in the product, and what is the model-governance and false-positive/negative posture?
What is the exposure to AI-native competitors and to foundation-model vendor pricing?

workstreams.label: Management diligence
questions: What is the depth of the leadership team below the CEO/CTO, and what are key-person risks?
What is the equity/retention plan for critical talent post-close?
What is management's operating plan and how credible is the 3-year model?

workstreams.label: GovCon diligence (if applicable)
questions: What share of ARR is federal, and what is the recompete schedule and incumbency position?
What is agency and program concentration, and what is budget/appropriation exposure?
Are contract vehicles (GSA, IDIQ) transferable on change of control?
